creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jov from comment #2)

Looks for ports that contain Makefile's containing 'MASTERDIR' and that also have a distinfo file.

I'd just create the slave port, override the distribution file / master site variables as necessary in the slave (make sure the variable can be overridden using ?+ in the master), then run make makesum to generate the distinfo
